original_image_tags: large black-and-white artist's rendering showing a large, circular, disc-shaped craft resting in a forest clearing. A cylindrical structure rises from the center of the disc. Two small, dark, humanoid figures stand near the object. Dense forest surrounds the clearing.
black-and-white photograph of an older man with glasses (Oskar Linke) and a younger girl (his step-daughter) leaning over a table, looking down at what appears to be a drawing or map.
cropped photograph of a typed and stamped German legal document.

elements.description: A sketch of a flying saucer in a forest clearing with three standing figures nearby. Captioned: 'Eye-witness Herr Linke himself directed the artist to produce this vivid impression of the flying saucer as he saw it in the clearing; beside it stand the two members of the crew, who took off in it shortly after.'
A photograph of a man and a young girl looking down at an object in their hands. Captioned: 'They saw the Flying Saucer: Oskar Linke and his 12-year-old step-daughter.'

An illustration of a signed and sealed official deposition document. Captioned: 'Here is part of the signed, sealed, official deposition which Herr Linke made in Berlin, telling the whole story of his fantastic experience.'
An advertisement logo for 'HOLLAND TOFFEE' with the text 'Best on Earth'.
An advertisement logo for 'Plaza Stockings' featuring a stylized animal illustration and the text 'Always to the fore'.
A black arrow graphic pointing right, containing the text 'FULL STORY PAGE 2'.
